fields.name: catalogue_route_prefix
fields.label: Catalogue Route Prefix
fields.description: URL prefix for the software catalogue. Default: /software

fields.name: packages_per_page
fields.label: Packages Per Page
fields.description: Number of packages shown per catalogue page

fields.name: related_packages_limit
fields.label: Related Packages Limit
fields.description: Maximum number of related packages shown on a detail page

fields.name: show_in_nav
fields.label: Show in Navigation
fields.description: Show Software link in the main user navigation menu
